sample_grants.description: Programme: Catholic Sisters. Description: to implement Phase VI of the Sisters Leadership Development Initiative in ten countries in Africa and establish an investment fund for Sister's education.

sample_grants.title: King Baudouin Foundation United States, Inc.
sample_grants.description: to strengthen the capacity of nine high-risk countries in the African region to respond to COVID-19 cases, through interventions addressing risk communication, infection protection and control, case management, and surveillance by WHO-AFRO.

sample_grants.title: Global Solidarity Fund
sample_grants.description: to build sisters communication and advocacy skills, support global advocacy against human trafficking, and leverage funding from multiple funders to support the Church and Sisters' human development agenda.

sample_grants.description: to expand the Sisters Leadership Development Initiative (SLDI) current work in the ten focus countries in Africa.
